t: […] wondrous, knowledge and insigh[t …] wondr[ous] firmaments […]
[…] in the essence of light, a splendor of […] every form of wond[rous] spirits […]
[…] godlike beings, fearfully powerful, all […] their [utt]erly wondrous acts by the power of the God of […]
[per]petual, exalting the warrior acts of the Go[d of …] from the four foundations of the wondrous firmament
they ann[oun]ce when they hear the sound of praise lifted up to God, […] blessing and praising the God of
the godlike. A tumu[lt …] the highest [heaven …] the glorious King […] of the wondrous foundations,
lifting up praise […] of the God of […] and all their foundations […] utterly
hol[y …] praise lifted up […] their [w]ings, ex[alting … over] their heads,
